entities.name: RICE
entities.description: The crop species being studied for disease resistance.

entities.name: SHEATH ROT
entities.description: An emerging disease affecting rice crops.

entities.name: SAROCLADIUM ORYZAE
entities.description: The fungal pathogen that causes sheath rot in rice.

entities.name: RWANDA
entities.description: A country where sheath rot of rice is an important emerging disease.

entities.name: SHEATH ROT RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of rice cultivars to resist infection by Sarocladium oryzae.

entities.name: SNP MARKERS
entities.description: Single nucleotide polymorphism markers used to analyze genetic diversity and identify parental materials.

entities.name: GENETIC DIVERSITY
entities.description: The total number of genetic characteristics in the genetic makeup of a species or population.

entities.name: UPGMA DENDROGRAM
entities.description: Unweighted Pair Group Method with Arithmetic Mean used to visualize genetic distances and group genotypes.

entities.name: HYBRIDISATION
entities.description: The process of crossing genetically distant parental materials to improve resistance.

entities.name: GENETIC DISTANCE
entities.description: A measure of the genetic divergence between different accessions or genotypes.
